content:
Almost everyday, someone asks "Is this character good?"  or "What team can I create?" Here is a guide to creating your first team.

***Very First Team Formula***
By following this starting formula for awakers (units in game) you will create a reasonable starting team

**Damage Type   |   Defense Type   |   Healer   |   (Anything you want)**

*Just note, it's not often easy to tell what units are good at healing.*

If you play the campaign, you'll unlock *Ramona (Assist Type)* and *Doll (Assist Type - Healer)*. Both of these are in the starting colour yellow or Chaos realm. Yellow characters can easily fit into most teams in the late game.  So now you'll have to pick two other units (awakers).

To do that go to **Interlude** then **Awaker Trial**. In the awaker trial you'll get to try out both unit mechanics and faction (realm) mechanics. Try them out and see what you like. **A nice tip is you can click  on the bar** (blue, red or purple) and it does something. Example using a Blue (aequor) team  and clicking the blue bar you can change the tentacle stance. 

Ultimately you'll want to make a main team for the campaign. You'll play with this team a lot so it's good to have one
 unit on your main team that you really love.
thread_title: How To Create a Team + Other Information

content:
***Realm Types***
All Realms (factions) are good. Ultimately you should decide on a realm with a play style you like. 

Yellow and Blue  (Chaos and Aequor) are a bit easier to pilot. Piloting = how and when you choose to play cards. These two realms are forgiving if you misplay card order. **For most beginner players start by getting these colours**

Red and Purple (Caro and Ultra) are a bit more challenging to pilot. You can be really strong if you choose the right order of actions, or be very weak if you chose poorly. That's why they are suggested for more advanced players. 

**Chaos (Yellow)**
This realm is built around generating S-Energy to use your Keeper Power (Posse).  A good general Posse is called *Mouse Wisdom* - which you get by playing the campaign.

**Aequor (Blue)**
This realm is built around tentacles. You can change the tentacle stance to be neutral, defensive or offensive. This realm is good for a longer battle because you can always choose a tentacle stance based on the current situation. 

**Caro (Red)**
This realm is built around sacrifice for a reward. You often sacrifice health, but get something in return. There is a round ball (crimson furnace) you can click to restore health. You also generate embryo cards which help you to exalt (unit special power move) faster.

**Ultra (Purple)**
This realm is built around card order (take an extra turn, do something if first card played (LEAP), etc.) They also are built around critical damage. 


**Realms - Pure or Mixed Type**
You can only mix two realms together. 

Pure = Yellow (Chaos) + another realm
Mixed = Any two colours

Pure realms don't have restrictions. Mixed realms have restrictions (like one less starting tentacles or less damage in ultra space). A Pure Chaos Team can use the Posse (keeper power) twice.
thread_title: How To Create a Team + Other Information

content:
***Starting Pure Team Examples***
These are units (awakers) you can get from the standard set. These are teams to get you started in the game. 

More than likely,  when you are playing the game a "banner" or other event will allow you to get special units. If you end up liking one of those special units  you can either swap  out from this starting team or just ask someone from the general chat channel for help creating a team with one special unit.

**Starting Chaos Team Example**

content:
***Type of Team***
After you have selected either a unit or a realm you really like, you can either create a team around a certain mechanic or have the team be versatile (have a wide variety of mechanics)

**Counter** - this is a retaliate mechanic and enemies are hurt by attacking you. 
**Poison** - you apply poison damage to enemies and they take damage after thier turn.  Poison stacks each time applied. The damage first goes to the enemies sheild then health.
**Bleed** - you apply bleed damage to an enemy. This damage only lasts one turn.
**Crit** - when you hit, you have a chance of doing basic + extra damage. There is both Crit Chance and Crit damage stats you should build.
**Piercing** -  damage that hits both shields and hp. Can also bypass some damage immunities from changing phases.

**Main Unit**
Eventually you will probably select one unit on your main team to be the main unit and build a team around that awaker. If you need help, go to the general chat and ask **"I love this awaker, what team should I build with them?"**

**Is this Awaker Good?**
Mid to late game you will create 5 teams to complete D-Tides. There are certain characters that excel in this stage of the game. That's what people are saying when they say the character is good or not -  "are they good in the end game?"  

What's most important when you are starting is **selecting your favorite unit to build around. **  Choose wisely as this will end up being the unit you put the most time and resources into.
thread_title: How To Create a Team + Other Information
